results.title: Trump says Reflecting Pool 'in full use,' confirms DC golf course work
results.description: President Donald Trump said that the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool on the National Mall is "in full use" after an algae bloom in the pool and portions of the blue paint applied during renovations he commissioned began peeling off earlier this month. results.description: Chevron (NYSE: CVX) is one of the world's largest and most diversified energy companies.
